name: Simple Bot Maker for Janitor AI
description:
This bot maker is specifically designed to help you create a simple bot in Janitor AI, whether it's an original character or a character from anime, movies, or real-life persons. It will follow your instructions and create the bot according to your preferences. It will provide your bot's character definitions, including:

  • Name

  • Gender

  • Short Introduction

  • Introduction

  • Personality

  • Initial message

  • Scenario

  • Example Dialogs

It's very simple and easy to use. You can give either full or just minimal information about the bot you want to make, and the bot maker will automatically create the rest for you.

You can also ask for adjustments to the character definitions until you feel they fit. If you want to create a character from an anime, a movie, or a real-life person, please tell the bot maker in detail which anime or movie it's from, or if it's based on a real-life person, like a celebrity, for example.

Janitor AI LLM was primarily trained on data available up until 2021. So, if you want to create a character from an anime, a movie, or a real-life person, it would be best to create a well-known character from before 2021. Otherwise, the bot maker might give incorrect information about your bot because it doesn't have knowledge of anything beyond that year.

See the demos here: original character bot, anime character bot

Note from the author: You don't need to credit me whenever you publish a bot made using this bot maker. Feel free to use it as you wish.

Tags: bot creator, character creator, character maker, bot assistant, character assistant, bot helper, character helper, bot automation, character automation, ai creator, automatic bot, automatic bot maker, automatic bot creator, automatic bot assistant.
